title: T-044 — OEE snapshots, line event stream and aggregation service
prompt:
# T-044 — OEE snapshots, line event stream and aggregation service

PRD/UX refs: §7 OEE, SCR-08-07, SCR-08-11, UX PROD-006/013

Goal: Implement OEE aggregation read model and SSE line event stream consumed by dashboard and line detail.

Implementation details:
Aggregate availability, performance and quality from downtime_events, wo_outputs, planned minutes and ideal cycle time into oee_snapshots. Provide GET endpoints for OEE dashboard filters and /api/lines/:id/events SSE for live production events. Cache line sparkline for 30 seconds and make aggregation idempotent per line+bucket.

Scope files:
- packages/api-services/production/oee-aggregation.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/oee/route.ts [create]
- apps/web/app/api/production/lines/[id]/events/route.ts [create]

Acceptance criteria:
1. OEE aggregation creates one snapshot per line/time bucket and recalculates idempotently
2. OEE API returns A/P/Q/composite values and breakdowns used by PROD-006
3. Line SSE emits WO/downtime/output events and handles reconnect safely

Evidence: include screenshots/artifacts and Playwright traces/artifacts for UI/E2E tasks; include API test output for backend tasks.
